subcodes.first_line: O thou who treadest the path of guidance! Though thou journeyest from the sacred precincts unto other lands, yet from the bounty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای سالک سبیل هدی هر چند از بقعه مبارکه ببلاد دیگر مسافرت مینمائى ولى از فضل
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @Shrines and Holy places, @firmness in the Covenant
